title: Organization / team membership and role policy (v1alpha2)
description: Runtime-local governance boundary for a Team/Organization instance: memberships, roles and team policy. TARGET-STATE contract. Enforced INSIDE the Runtime by the Team Capability Pack; the Hub never arbitrates per-action business permissions and never receives user content. References users by opaque handle only (no PII). Requires an active team/organization entitlement to take effect; on degradation, additional members become read-only (never deleted).

memberships.description: User-organization relations with a role. Exactly one member MUST have role 'owner' (enforced by contains/minContains/maxContains): the single instance owner whose access is preserved in every degradation state.

areas.description: Optional area-scoped restriction for light collaborators.

team_policy.description: Governance defaults for the team/organization instance.

requires_capabilities.description: Capabilities that must be present for this policy to be enforced (e.g. 'team_collaboration'). On degradation the policy persists but additional members become read-only.
